metadata.name: IPAM Regional Root Pool
metadata.description: Deploys IPAM Regional Root Pool and Child Pools. Pre-requisite is an existing Azure Virtual Network Manager instance.
Required. Region short name e.g. ae.
Required. Regional root pool number e.g. 001.
Required. Regional root pool address prefix e.g. 10.x.x.x/16.
Required. Array of child pool objects containing prefix, displayName and addressPrefix.
Required. Azure Virtual Network Manager name e.g. vnm-tst-xxxx.
Optional. Specify the type of resource lock.

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}-{2}-pool-{3}', parameters('avnmName'), parameters('childPools')[copyIndex()].prefix, parameters('regionShortName'), parameters('poolNumber'))]
dependsOn: [resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkManagers/ipamPools', split(format('{0}/{1}-pool-{2}', parameters('avnmName'), parameters('regionShortName'), parameters('poolNumber')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}-pool-{2}', parameters('avnmName'), parameters('regionShortName'), parameters('poolNumber')), '/')[1])]

resources.scope: [format('Microsoft.Network/networkManagers/{0}/ipamPools/{1}', split(format('{0}/{1}-pool-{2}', parameters('avnmName'), parameters('regionShortName'), parameters('poolNumber')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}-pool-{2}', parameters('avnmName'), parameters('regionShortName'), parameters('poolNumber')), '/')[1])]
resources.name: [variables('lockName')]

properties.notes: [if(equals(parameters('resourceLock'), 'CanNotDelete'), 'Cannot delete resource or child resources.', 'Cannot modify the resource or child resources.')]

dependsOn: [resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkManagers/ipamPools', split(format('{0}/{1}-pool-{2}', parameters('avnmName'), parameters('regionShortName'), parameters('poolNumber')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}-pool-{2}', parameters('avnmName'), parameters('regionShortName'), parameters('poolNumber')), '/')[1])]

metadata.description: The name of the deployed regional root pool.
The resource ID of the deployed regional root pool.

rootPoolId.value: [resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkManagers/ipamPools', split(format('{0}/{1}-pool-{2}', parameters('avnmName'), parameters('regionShortName'), parameters('poolNumber')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}-pool-{2}', parameters('avnmName'), parameters('regionShortName'), parameters('poolNumber')), '/')[1])]
